arts.ttl: Howe 'reward' makes little sense as Newcastle boss receives clear Tonali message
arts.sum: But if Willock was handed such a prize for an impressive cameo in Newcastle United's win at Wolves, why hasn't Sandro Tonali started recent matches following his impressive return to competitive football? Instead, with Willock returning to play on the left of Newcastle's midfield three, Joelinton was moved to an unfamiliar role on the right, over Tonali, and struggled.

arts.ttl: Man City suffer major injury blow ahead of Newcastle United clash as update given
arts.sum: Manchester City will be without influential midfielder Rodri for the weekend’s Premier League clash against Newcastle United after he injured his knee against Arsenal. The injury meant that Rodri was expected to miss the game, but it is reported that he could be set for a significant lay-off.

arts.ttl: Newcastle keeping tabs on 27-year-old with 140 Premier League appearances
arts.sum: Newcastle are keeping an eye on the situation surrounding Liverpool defender Joe Gomez according to reports. Gomez has yet to start a game for Liverpool this season and is facing an uncertain future at the club, with Arne Slot preferring to go with other options. Liverpool take on West Ham in the Carabao Cup on […] The post Newcastle keeping tabs on 27-year-old with 140 Premier League appearances appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: AFC Wimbledon vs Newcastle: Carabao Cup tie moved to Premier League ground and handed new date
arts.sum: AFC Wimbledon's meeting with Newcastle United on Tuesday night was called off on Monday after a giant sinkhole appeared on the field at the Cherry Red Records Stadium - but now an agreement on a rescheduled match has been agreed

arts.ttl: Newcastle United legend Nobby Solano back in management after Blyth nightmare
arts.sum: Newcastle United legend Nobby Solano has moved on from his nightmare exit at Blyth Spartans to take over Peruvian outfit San Marcos. Solano parted company with Blyth after just six matches but has quickly found work in his home country and hopes to lead San Marcos to the top-flight this season.

arts.ttl: The shocking Man City Rodri stat Newcastle United can increase this weekend
arts.sum: The City boss will no doubt rotate his squad for the fixture, but one player who looks set to miss the game is influential midfielder Rodri. Wins over Manchester City have been few and far between for Newcastle United in recent years but they may have been given a timely boost heading into the game.

arts.ttl: Fresh pictures show damage of Wimbledon pitch as massive sinkhole leaves Newcastle game in doubt
arts.sum: The EFL rulebook says: "If a club is unable to fulfil its obligation to complete a competition match for any reason then the Management Committee shall use its reasonable endeavours to rearrange the fixture for the earliest reasonable opportunity (including but not limited to arranging for the Competition Match to be played at a neutral venue) which will not be later than the date of the first Competition Match scheduled to take place in the immediately following round. Wimbledon have announced the closure of the stadium until further notice but the severity of the damage means it is highly unlikely any football will be played at the fourth-tier ground for a considerable amount of time.

arts.ttl: Furious Alexander Isak makes feelings clear as Newcastle United try to fix problem
arts.sum: Newcastle boss Howe felt that the presence of Jacob Murphy, who set up Harvey Barnes, made a difference and said: "I thought we were better in the second half so there is a degree that the substitutions helped us at that stage, maybe not the latter ones where I thought our performance tailed off in the second period." Isak's frustrations boiled over in the second half when Fabian Schar was handed the ball in gift-wrapped manner but failed to square it to his centre-forward and fired into the side netting when the best option was to square it.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer gives verdict on Newcastle row involving Eddie Howe and transfer chief
arts.sum: Newcastle United suffered their first Premier League defeat of the season against Fulham on Saturday and former striker Alan Shearer has weighed in on the club's predicamnte

arts.ttl: ‘Sinkhole’ opens up in middle of AFC Wimbledon’s pitch as Newcastle match called off amid floods
arts.sum: A ‘sinkhole’ has opened up in the middle of AFC Wimbledon’s pitch after heavy rain and flooding.
